# WhereWeDance

> A local guide to Boston's bachata scene: socials, classes, organizers, beginner resources, and community values. UI prototype with mock data.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing overview of the Boston bachata pilot.
- [This Week](/this-week): Every Boston bachata social and class, night by night.
- [All Events](/events): Full directory of listed bachata socials and classes.
- [Organizers](/organizers): Studios, collectives, and community groups behind Boston's bachata nights.
- [Resources](/resources): Community docs, playlists, comps, and groups.
- [Beginner Guide](/beginner-guide): A safe route from zero to your first social.
- [Boston Bachata Scene](/boston-bachata): Plain-words guide to weekly rhythm, venues, and etiquette.
- [Community Values](/values): The floor we're trying to keep, co-written with organizers.
- [Ask WhereWeDance](/ask): Grounded local Q&A that cites events and resources.
- [Practice Buddies](/buddies): Public board for finding drill partners.
- [Contact](/contact): Suggest corrections, resources, new cities or styles.
- [Safety](/safety): How to report a safety concern.

## Optional

- [More](/more): Index of secondary pages.
